description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult male pedestrian with a stocky build, standing with arms extended horizontally. He is dressed in a short-sleeved, collared shirt and fitted pants, with simple shoes covering his feet. The figure has a full beard and short, neatly styled hair, and his facial features are clearly defined. The clothing fits loosely around the torso and arms, while the pants are more form-fitting. The hands are open and fingers are slightly spread, and the shoes appear to be basic slip-ons. The overall appearance suggests a casual, everyday urban style suitable for city streets or parks.
description: A stocky adult male in casual attire, standing with arms outstretched, featuring a collared shirt, fitted pants, and simple shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, beard, collared shirt, and open hands with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the shirt's drape, and the side of the pants and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, and pants, with both arms fully extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, shirt, and the side of the pants and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved collared shirt and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
